author: lOrm
content: Fix landed on branch fix/694-acp-hooks (commits be85aed3..a2a4fd45 — squash on integration). ACP path now runs PreToolUse + PostToolUse hooks and consults rules engine in system prompt build. Tests: 4 new in acp::pre_tool_gate_tests; cargo clippy --lib --tests -- -D warnings exit 0; cargo test --lib (skip tools::worktree) 1416 passing. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore].
